flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Normandale Community College fell 20% between 2006 and 2009 (12.3% → 9.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Normandale Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Normandale Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (6.2k → 7.0k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Normandale Community College fell 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($13.3k → $12.0k).
